auth.registerSubtitle: You need an account to buy a story.

auth.resetSubtitle: Use a strong password you have not used elsewhere.
auth.resetNeedLink: Open the link from your email first, or request a new reset link.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for this email, you will receive a reset link shortly.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then log in.

shop.title: Stories

admin.dashboardSubtitle: Recent orders and games that need attention.

hero.headline: Someone has started writing to you.
hero.subLine1: It’s not a book. It’s not a game.
hero.subLine2: It’s a story that comes home to you, letter after letter.

steps.title: What happens
steps.subtitle: Simple. Four steps.
items: And find out what happens next.

different.title: Why it’s different
items: You have to wait for it

visual.title: Real mail
visual.body: Paper, envelope, postmark: a rhythm unlike your feed. Printed letters sent to you — you engage when you’re ready, not when an algorithm says so.
visual.mockHomeCaption: In the rhythm of your day

social.title: From early readers
social.subtitle: Test feedback
social.quote: “I didn’t think I’d actually wait for the next letter.”

cta.title: Ready for the first one?
cta.subtitle: Join the first test — limited spots.

compare.title: What really changes
compare.tagline: One line can stop the scroll
compare.weakLine: A story that writes to you
compare.strongLine: Someone has started writing to you.
